sourceText: Slightly overstuff with Poly-fil (or other fiber fill). Do not close hole as it is difficult to reopen. Tuck tail into Knocker so that filling can be adjusted as needed.
title: Stuff Knocker

validationIssues.sourceText: Slightly overstuff with Poly-fil (or other fiber fill). Do not close hole as it is difficult to reopen. Tuck tail into Knocker so that filling can be adjusted as needed.
